name: microfrontend-system
description: Production-ready Microfrontend Architecture with Module Federation

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspaces --if-present & npm run dev:host
scripts.dev:stop: for port in 5000 5001 5002 5003; do lsof -ti :$port | xargs -r kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; done
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:stop && concurrently -n host,dashboard,user,reports -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w host-app" "npm run dev -w dashboard-app" "npm run dev -w user-app" "npm run dev -w reports-app"
scripts.dev:remotes: concurrently -n dashboard,user,reports -c green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w dashboard-app" "npm run dev -w user-app" "npm run dev -w reports-app"
